creator: sk8harddiefast@gmail.com
text:
When i try to format an hdd with sysinstall and sade hdd cannot create slice.

I have a 500 giga hdd (ad4), i say A for entire disk (on partition part).
ok. Creates ad4s1. I press write and now i am going to Label it. I choose
C option (all the available mb), i create a slice named ad4s1d on /mnt/500g
and i write changes.Exit from sade or sysinstall.
Now on my /dev i have:
ad4
ad4s1 
but nowhere ad4s1d!
